title: Global Market Today: Asian shares hesitant as oil climbs, earnings loom
description: Asian markets showed hesitation as oil prices climbed due to escalating Gulf conflict. This surge revived inflation worries, influencing Federal Reserve rate hike expectations. Major tech earnings this week will test investor confidence in artificial intelligence stocks. South Korea's market experienced significant losses after retail investors were squeezed out. The European Central Bank is expected to hold rates steady at its upcoming meeting.

title: Alphabet, Intel in focus as US earnings season gathers steam
description: Corporate earnings season is gathering steam with key updates expected soon. Alphabet and Intel reports will influence the market-leading artificial intelligence trade. High profit expectations and Iran war uncertainty are currently impacting investor sentiment. The S&P 500 saw a weekly decline, driven by semiconductor share pullbacks. However, the benchmark index remains significantly up for the year.
